title: BLUELIGHT: Attack Path (per Host)
description: Link analysis grouping BLUELIGHT-related events into 5-minute sequences keyed on host plus process. The link visualization renders each host as a chain of process transitions, exposing the full attack path from drive-by IE compromise through credential theft and graph.microsoft.com exfiltration on a single canvas.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and ('Process Name' like '%bluelight.exe' or 'Source Process' like '%bluelight.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '%iexplore.exe' or 'Destination Hostname' like '%graph.microsoft.com%' or 'Destination Hostname' like '%mail.google.com%' or 'Destination Hostname' like '%jquery.services%' or 'Granted Access' = '0x1fffff' or 'Target Filename' like '%bluelight.pdb%' or 'Target Filename' like '%cheV01%' or 'Command Line' like '%FromBase64String%' or 'Command Line' like '%cookie_name: OSID%' or 'Command Line' like '%ipinfo.io%') | link span = 5minute 'Host Name (Server)', 'Process Name' | eventstats max(Count) as PeakEvents, sum(Count) as Events, distinctcount('Host Name (Server)') as Hosts, distinctcount('Process Name') as Processes

visualizationOptions.tileLayoutXml: <title-text>Peak Path</title-text><title-text>Events</title-text><title-text>Hosts</title-text><title-text>Processes</title-text>

ask_ai_prompts: Trace the BLUELIGHT attack path on the top affected host.
Which hosts show the most diverse process chain?
